justification: La task PRINCIPALE du papier est 'relationship prediction' (predire le TYPE de relation) : abstract 'end-to-end solution for the relationship prediction task', resultats 'RelGNN optimized by ASA for relationship prediction improves SOTA'. Les configs disent Link Prediction.
'For the 1-to-1 relation prediction, head-entity forecast improved Hits@10' = decoupage des resultats de LINK prediction par categorie de relation (1-to-1/1-to-N), pas une task Relation Prediction.
'KG related tasks, such as triple classification [14] and link prediction [18]' = enumeration citee, pas d'evaluation TC dans le papier.
'a more efficient entity alignment method may be needed to apply to large...' = limitation/travaux futurs, pas d'evaluation EA.

Matche via l'alias 'KG completion' dans le related work TransE ('TransE has demonstrated promising performance for KG completion'). Le papier est un papier d'Entity Alignment (extraite), il n'evalue pas LP.
Unique occurrence = caption de la Figure 5 illustrant la task de LINK prediction ('? indicates the missing entity or relation'). Aucune evaluation de relation prediction.
Matche via l'alias 'knowledge graph completion' employe comme terme-parapluie ('KGC tasks including triple classification'). Le papier evalue la Triple Classification (extraite), pas LP.
'FB15k-237 widely applied to KG completion tasks, such as link prediction and triple classification' = description de l'usage du dataset, pas une evaluation TC.

'shown in Table 5. TABLE V. TERNARY CLASSIFICATION EXPERIMENTAL RESULT' + conclusion 'achieves significant improvements on... triplet classification. The experimental results show...' : le papier A une experience de classification de triplets non extraite.
'link prediction [Shang et al.] and triplet classification [Wang et al.]' = enumeration citee en intro.
'possible enhancements with latent relation prediction will continue for our future works' = travaux futurs.
'tasks such as link prediction, triplet classification, and knowledge graph completion' = enumeration d'intro.

'TABLE V COMPARISON OF VARIOUS ALGORITHMS ON TASKS OF RELATION PREDICTION AND TRIPLET CLASSIFICATION' + 'new experiment further justifies' : evaluation reelle de relation prediction (appendice) non extraite.
'usually divided into link prediction, triple classification, and relation prediction (Lin et al. ...)' = taxonomie de related work.
Meme phrase de taxonomie que ci-dessus.

Le papier evalue la RELATION prediction (extraite, 'Table 1: Evaluation results on relation prediction') ; LP n'apparait que pour comparer ses observations a celles connues en LP ('matches/disagrees with the observations for the task of link prediction').
'encyclopedias like Wikipedia through entity alignment. These types are usually constructed...' = contexte sur la construction des infos de type, pas d'evaluation EA.
3 occurrences, toutes en related work (CrossE, section 2.2 background, TransE). Papier d'Entity Alignment (extraite), n'evalue pas LP.
'The third column shows bar charts for Relation Prediction Accuracy (%) for TuckerDNCaching and MD...' : resultats du MODELE PROPOSE sur relation prediction, non extraits.
Unique occurrence = enumeration d'intro 'tasks such as link prediction and triplet classification'.
